name: asc-error-on-incomparable-key-types
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SortWithCmpResultNotNumber :message "sortWith comparator must return a Number, got Error" :actualType "Error" :actualValue !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :AscKeysNotComparable :message "asc cannot compare Number with String" :operand "asc" :leftType "Number" :rightType "String" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 33 :line 1 :column 34 } :end { :offset 35 :line 1 :column 36 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 29 :line 1 :column 30 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } } :input { :left {:k 1} :right {:k "a"} } } :trail [] } :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "sortWith" :args [{ :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 33 :line 1 :column 34 } :end { :offset 35 :line 1 :column 36 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 29 :line 1 :column 30 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } }] :effectful false :text "sortWith(asc(/k))" :location { :start { :offset 20 :line 1 :column 21 } :end { :offset 37 :line 1 :column 38 } } } :input [{:k 1} {:k "a"}] } :trail [] }

name: asc-error-on-null-key
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :SortWithCmpResultNotNumber :message "sortWith comparator must return a Number, got Error" :actualType "Error" :actualValue !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :AscKeysNotComparable :message "asc cannot compare Number with Null" :operand "asc" :leftType "Number" :rightType "Null" :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 34 :line 1 :column 35 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 30 :line 1 :column 31 } :end { :offset 37 :line 1 :column 38 } } } :input { :left {:k 1} :right {:k null} } } :trail [] } :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "sortWith" :args [{ :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 34 :line 1 :column 35 } :end { :offset 36 :line 1 :column 37 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 30 :line 1 :column 31 } :end { :offset 37 :line 1 :column 38 } } }] :effectful false :text "sortWith(asc(/k))" :location { :start { :offset 21 :line 1 :column 22 } :end { :offset 38 :line 1 :column 39 } } } :input [{:k 1} {:k null}] } :trail [] }

name: asc-error-on-direct-non-pair-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :AscPairNotMap :message "asc requires a pair Map subject ({ :left x :right y }), got Number" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["x"] :effectful false :text "/x" :location { :start { :offset 9 :line 1 :column 10 } :end { :offset 11 :line 1 :column 12 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/x)" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: asc-error-on-direct-vec-subject
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :AscPairNotMap :message "asc requires a pair Map subject ({ :left x :right y }), got Vec" :actualType "Vec" :actualValue [1 2] :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "asc" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["x"] :effectful false :text "/x" :location { :start { :offset 12 :line 1 :column 13 } :end { :offset 14 :line 1 :column 15 } } }] :effectful false :text "asc(/x)" :location { :start { :offset 8 :line 1 :column 9 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } } :input [1 2] } :trail [] }

name: asc-with-recursive-let-key
query: let(:total, add(1, /children * total | sum)) | [{:children [{:children []} {:children [{:children []}]}]} {:children [{:children []}]}] | sortWith(asc(total)) * total
